Evidence Level: Emerging

MindGamer

Focus and processing speed training through adaptive exercises that adjust to your skill level.

About This Tool

MindGamer targets attention, concentration, and processing speed with adaptive difficulty algorithms.

How It Helps

  • Focus — builds concentration stamina
  • Processing speed — rapid discrimination training
  • Visual attention — target detection practice
  • Auditory processing — sound discrimination
  • Inhibition — response control training
  • Adaptive difficulty — optimal challenge zone

Best For

ADHD & Focus

Core focus-training exercises

Memory & Brain Fog

Processing speed clears sluggishness

Anxiety & Panic

Cognitive control reduces chaos

Trauma & PTSD

Rebuilds mental endurance

Visit MindGamer →

Alternative Tools

Other tools you might find useful for similar goals.

BrainHQ

Clinically proven attention training.

Brain Trainer Pro

Dual n-back style training.

Brain Workshop

Open-source dual n-back.
